core_mechanism: a network of coupled phase oscillators that transitions to collective synchronization (mutual phase-locking) once coupling exceeds a critical strength — the Kuramoto coupled-oscillator model — here specialized to a two-population (bimodal) distribution of natural frequencies
brief_reason: The abstract explicitly maps the studied system onto a Kuramoto-like model of synchronized oscillators, with a bimodal frequency distribution capturing two opposed oscillator populations ('sources' and 'consumers').
